results.title: Le Thi Thuy re-elected President of Vietnam Women’s Union
results.description: Le Thi Thuy, President of the Vietnam Women’s Union (VWU) for the 14th tenure, affirmed that in response to the country’s development requirements in the new era, the Central Committee and Standing Board of the VWU will continue to uphold the tradition of solidarity and unity, and make every effort to lead and coordinate the successful implementation of the Resolution of the 14th National Women’s Congress. Women's congress charts new direction for empowerment, development Vovinam-based project launched in Japan to promote women’s empowerment INSPIRE FEST 2026 promotes empowerment of persons with disabilities

results.title: Giorgia Meloni’s Daughter Captivates Attention at G7 Summit Welcome
results.description: Giorgia Meloni’s 10-year-old daughter, Ginevra Giambruno, unexpectedly became a focal point during the G7 Summit in Geneva. The young girl attracted significant attention for her shy demeanour amidst the official welcome ceremony. As world leaders gathered for high-level discussions, Ginevra’s natural childlike responses to the intense media frenzy surrounding them were notable. results.title: Is the red hat society political
results.description: The Red Hat Society (RHS) is widely recognizable for its members’ distinctive red hats and purple attire, often seen enjoying social gatherings. This vibrant image prompts questions about its underlying purpose, particularly regarding political engagement. To address this, understanding the organization’s core mission and operational philosophy is essential. The Heart of the Red Hat Society: [...]

results.title: China's yuan weakens to one-week low on strong dollar, Fed hike bets weigh
results.description: SHANGHAI: China's yuan fell to a one-week low against the dollar on Thursday, reflecting broad greenback strength on mounting bets the Federal Reserve will hike interest rates later this year.
